alchemy.label: Alchemy
alchemy.description: Use an alchemy table to compound herbs, water, salt, and other ingredients into teas, broths, or salves.

param.input_item: Ingredient or reagent from # Backpack ({name, index}).
param.inputs_array: Herbs plus water/salt/reagents. Repeat entries when multiple units are needed.

alchemy.result_note: result includes medicine, quality, freshness, and proficiency changes.
